# Technical Indicators

## Momentum Indicators

### RSI

The Relative Strength Index measures overbought and oversold conditions.

#### Calculation

RSI = 100 - (100 / (1 + RS)) where RS = average gain / average loss.

#### Interpretation

RSI above 70 is overbought. RSI below 30 is oversold.

### MACD

Moving Average Convergence Divergence shows trend changes.

## Volatility Indicators

### Bollinger Bands

Bollinger Bands measure price volatility using standard deviations.

### ATR

Average True Range measures market volatility.
